description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 12/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review generated code and source-aware error messages.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Reviewed generated V3 agent helpers and source-aware errors. Removed generated output/output_schema aliases, replaced generated guardrail helpers with controls/input_controls/operation_controls/result_controls, updated Kino definition rendering to use result, and locked controls error path/hint coverage. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E1: Review generated code and source-aware error messages
